"'''The Emperor's Trophy'''" was a short story and role-playing game written by Peter Schweighofer, originally published in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 11|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 11]] and later reprinted on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']].

==Plot summary==
After the [[Occupation of Bespin|duel]] on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Lord Vader]] arrives at the [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] storehouse. The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] meets with his master the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]].

He brings a trophy: [[Anakin Skywalker's second lightsaber/Legends|his lightsaber]] — and the remains of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] severed hand. Palpatine reveals that he has foreseen Skywalker's fate, and returns to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Continuity==
Just what the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] planned to do with this trophy would not be revealed until the events of ''[[The Last Command]]'' ([[1993]]), the third book of the [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|Thrawn Trilogy]], which was published before this short story.<ref name="TERC" />
